privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: A-Guy ('we', 'our', 'us') is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our educational platform.

account.title: Account Information
account.description: When you create an account, we collect your name, email address, and password. You may optionally provide additional profile information.

usage.title: Usage Data
usage.description: We automatically collect information about your interactions with our platform, including lessons accessed, exercises completed, time spent, and progress data.

technical.title: Technical Information
technical.description: We collect device information, IP address, browser type, operating system, and other technical data to provide and improve our services.

howWeUseInformation.title: How We Use Your Information
howWeUseInformation.provide: To provide, maintain, and improve our educational services
howWeUseInformation.personalize: To personalize your learning experience and track your progress
howWeUseInformation.communicate: To communicate with you about your account, updates, and educational content
howWeUseInformation.analyze: To analyze usage patterns and improve our platform's functionality
howWeUseInformation.protect: To protect against fraud, abuse, and security threats

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing and Disclosure
dataSharing.description: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information only in the following circumstances:
dataSharing.serviceProviders: With service providers who help us operate our platform (e.g., cloud hosting, analytics)
dataSharing.legal: When required by law or to protect our legal rights
dataSharing.consent: With your explicit consent or at your direction

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.description: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your information. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.access: Access and review your personal information
yourRights.delete: Request deletion of your account and personal information

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.description: We retain your information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. You may request deletion of your account at any time.

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.description: Our platform is designed for users of all ages. For users under 18, we recommend parental guidance and supervision.

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking
cookies.description: We use cookies and similar technologies to provide functionality, analyze usage, and improve user experience. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.description: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes through the platform or via email.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at: privacy@aguy.co.il

commitment.title: Our Commitment
commitment.description: A-Guy is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people of all abilities. We are continually improving the user experience for everyone and applying relevant accessibility standards.

standards.title: Accessibility Standards
standards.description: We strive to conform to the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 Level AA. These guidelines explain how to make web content more accessible for people with disabilities.

features.title: Accessibility Features
features.focus: Clear focus indicators for interactive elements

languages.title: Language Support
languages.description: Our platform supports both Hebrew and English, with full right-to-left (RTL) support for Hebrew content.

testing.title: Ongoing Efforts
testing.description: We regularly review our platform for accessibility issues and work to address them. We use both automated tools and manual testing to ensure compliance.

compatibility.title: Browser Compatibility
compatibility.description: Our platform is designed to work with modern web browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge with assistive technologies enabled.

feedback.title: Feedback and Support
feedback.description: We welcome feedback on the accessibility of our platform. If you encounter any accessibility barriers or have suggestions for improvement, please contact us:
feedback.commitment: We are committed to responding to accessibility feedback and making necessary improvements.

limitations.title: Known Limitations
limitations.description: Despite our efforts, some areas may not yet be fully accessible. We are actively working to improve these areas:
limitations.thirdParty: Some third-party integrations may have accessibility limitations
limitations.legacy: Certain legacy content may require additional accessibility improvements

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.description: For accessibility-related questions, concerns, or feedback, please reach out to us at accessibility@aguy.co.il
